headline: Baker Hughes Q1 Revenue Beats Estimates by $260 Million as LNG Orders Surge
summary: Baker Hughes beat Q1 2026 estimates with $6.59B in revenue as LNG equipment and data center orders offset Middle East drilling weakness.
